original_registry_entry.exact_document_title: DOH Guidelines on Screening for Osteoporosis
original_registry_entry.population: Adults primarily aged over 50 years, with age, sex, fracture-risk, treatment, and secondary-cause qualifiers.
original_registry_entry.clinical_setting: DOH-licensed primary care screening and risk assessment for osteoporosis in Abu Dhabi.
original_registry_entry.applicability_note: UAE-direct but partial for this unrestricted follow-up workflow. Exact only for selected fracture-risk, falls, risk-factor, DEXA, and clinician-arranged monitoring documentation; it is not a treatment guideline.

exact_sections.heading: Purpose, scope, and target population
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Defines Abu Dhabi primary-care osteoporosis screening scope, primarily for adults over 50, with follow-up and treatment-effect monitoring context.

exact_sections.heading: Fracture risk assessment
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports detailed risk history, fragility-fracture context, falls risk, FRAX and BMD context, and monitoring of treatment effects.

exact_sections.heading: Risk factors for osteoporosis
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports documenting falls, low calcium or vitamin D context, low weight, smoking or alcohol, medicine context, personal or family fracture history, and secondary causes.

exact_sections.heading: Bone mineral density assessment
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports clinician-reviewed DEXA reporting with age and risk qualifiers and without independently assigning a diagnosis.

title: DOH Guidelines on Screening for Osteoporosis
population: Adults primarily aged over 50 years, with age, sex, fracture-risk, treatment, and secondary-cause qualifiers.
intended_setting: DOH-licensed primary care screening and risk assessment for osteoporosis in Abu Dhabi.
